L.zh-CN: 对自己下手比别人还狠，夸你两句你都想先验明真伪。
L.zh-TW: 對自己下手比別人還狠，誇你兩句你都想先驗明真偽。
L.en: You are harder on yourself than anyone else could be, and even praise makes you want to verify it first.

M.zh-CN: 自信值随天气波动，顺风能飞，逆风先缩。
M.zh-TW: 自信值隨天氣波動，順風能飛，逆風先縮。
M.en: Your confidence rises and falls with the weather; you fly with a tailwind and shrink against a headwind.

H.zh-CN: 心里对自己大致有数，不太会被路人一句话打散。
H.zh-TW: 心裡對自己大致有數，不太會被路人一句話打散。
H.en: You have a fairly solid read on yourself and are not easily shaken by a random remark.

L.zh-CN: 内心频道雪花较多，常在“我是谁”里循环缓存。
L.zh-TW: 內心頻道雪花較多，常在“我是誰”裡循環緩存。
L.en: Your inner channel is full of static, and you keep looping on the question of who you are.

M.zh-CN: 平时还能认出自己，偶尔也会被情绪临时换号。
M.zh-TW: 平時還能認出自己，偶爾也會被情緒臨時換號。
M.en: Most of the time you can still recognize yourself, though emotions occasionally swap the channel.

H.zh-CN: 对自己的脾气、欲望和底线都算门儿清。
H.zh-TW: 對自己的脾氣、慾望和底線都算門兒清。
H.en: You know your temperament, desires, and boundaries pretty well.

L.zh-CN: 更在意舒服和安全，没必要天天给人生开冲刺模式。
L.zh-TW: 更在意舒服和安全，沒必要天天給人生開衝刺模式。
L.en: You care more about comfort and safety; there is no need to run life in sprint mode every day.

M.zh-CN: 想上进，也想躺会儿，价值排序经常内部开会。
M.zh-TW: 想上進，也想躺會兒，價值排序經常內部開會。
M.en: You want to improve, but you also want to lie down; your values keep holding internal meetings.

H.zh-CN: 很容易被目标、成长或某种重要信念推着往前。
H.zh-TW: 很容易被目標、成長或某種重要信念推著往前。
H.en: You are easily pushed forward by goals, growth, or a belief that matters to you.

L.zh-CN: 感情里警报器灵敏，已读不回都能脑补到大结局。
L.zh-TW: 感情裡警報器靈敏，已讀不回都能腦補到大結局。
L.en: Your relationship alarm is very sensitive, and even left-on-read can become a whole ending in your head.

M.zh-CN: 一半信任，一半试探，感情里常在心里拉锯。
M.zh-TW: 一半信任，一半試探，感情裡常在心裡拉鋸。
M.en: You are half trusting, half testing, and often feel the tug-of-war inside relationships.

H.zh-CN: 更愿意相信关系本身，不会被一点风吹草动吓散。
H.zh-TW: 更願意相信關係本身，不會被一點風吹草動嚇散。
H.en: You are more willing to trust the relationship itself and are not easily scared off by small fluctuations.

L.zh-CN: 感情投入偏克制，心门不是没开，是门禁太严。
L.zh-TW: 感情投入偏剋制，心門不是沒開，是門禁太嚴。
L.en: You invest in emotions cautiously; the heart is not closed, just heavily gated.

M.zh-CN: 会投入，但会给自己留后手，不至于全盘梭哈。
M.zh-TW: 會投入，但會給自己留後手，不至於全盤梭哈。
M.en: You do invest, but you keep a backup plan so you do not go all in at once.

H.zh-CN: 一旦认定就容易认真，情绪和精力都给得很足。
H.zh-TW: 一旦認定就容易認真，情緒和精力都給得很足。
H.en: Once you commit, you tend to take it seriously and give plenty of emotion and energy.

L.zh-CN: 容易黏人也容易被黏，关系里的温度感很重要。
L.zh-TW: 容易黏人也容易被黏，關係裡的溫度感很重要。
L.en: You can get clingy and can also be clung to; the temperature of a relationship matters a lot.

M.zh-CN: 亲密和独立都要一点，属于可调节型依赖。
M.zh-TW: 親密和獨立都要一點，屬於可調節型依賴。
M.en: You want both closeness and independence, so your dependence is adjustable.

H.zh-CN: 空间感很重要，再爱也得留一块属于自己的地。
H.zh-TW: 空間感很重要，再愛也得留一塊屬於自己的地。
H.en: You value personal space highly; even when you love deeply, you still need your own ground.

L.zh-CN: 看世界自带防御滤镜，先怀疑，再靠近。
L.zh-TW: 看世界自帶防禦濾鏡，先懷疑，再靠近。
L.en: You look at the world through a defensive filter: suspect first, approach later.

M.zh-CN: 既不天真也不彻底阴谋论，观望是你的本能。
M.zh-TW: 既不天真也不徹底陰謀論，觀望是你的本能。
M.en: You are neither naive nor a full conspiracy theorist; keeping watch is your instinct.

H.zh-CN: 更愿意相信人性和善意，遇事不急着把世界判死刑。
H.zh-TW: 更願意相信人性和善意，遇事不急著把世界判死刑。
H.en: You are more willing to trust human nature and goodwill, and do not rush to condemn the world.

L.zh-CN: 规则能绕就绕，舒服和自由往往排在前面。
L.zh-TW: 規則能繞就繞，舒服和自由往往排在前面。
L.en: You bend rules when you can, and comfort and freedom usually come first.

M.zh-CN: 该守的时候守，该变通的时候也不死磕。
M.zh-TW: 該守的時候守，該變通的時候也不死磕。
M.en: You keep rules when needed and flex when necessary; no point dying on every hill.

H.zh-CN: 秩序感较强，能按流程来就不爱即兴炸场。
H.zh-TW: 秩序感較強，能按流程來就不愛即興炸場。
H.en: You have a stronger sense of order and do not enjoy improvising chaos when a process will do.

L.zh-CN: 意义感偏低，容易觉得很多事都像在走过场。
L.zh-TW: 意義感偏低，容易覺得很多事都像在走過場。
L.en: Your sense of meaning is low, and many things can feel like you are just going through the motions.

M.zh-CN: 偶尔有目标，偶尔也想摆烂，人生观处于半开机。
M.zh-TW: 偶爾有目標，偶爾也想擺爛，人生觀處於半開機。
M.en: Sometimes you have goals, sometimes you want to give up; your worldview is only half booted.

H.zh-CN: 做事更有方向，知道自己大概要往哪边走。
H.zh-TW: 做事更有方向，知道自己大概要往哪邊走。
H.en: You tend to move with a clearer direction and know roughly where you want to go.

L.zh-CN: 做事先考虑别翻车，避险系统比野心更先启动。
L.zh-TW: 做事先考慮別翻車，避險系統比野心更先啟動。
L.en: You think about avoiding failure before anything else; your risk system starts before your ambition does.

M.zh-CN: 有时想赢，有时只想别麻烦，动机比较混合。
M.zh-TW: 有時想贏，有時只想別麻煩，動機比較混合。
M.en: Sometimes you want to win, sometimes you just want to avoid trouble; your motives are mixed.

H.zh-CN: 更容易被成果、成长和推进感点燃。
H.zh-TW: 更容易被成果、成長和推進感點燃。
H.en: You are more easily driven by results, growth, and the feeling of progress.

L.zh-CN: 做决定前容易多转几圈，脑内会议常常超时。
L.zh-TW: 做決定前容易多轉幾圈，腦內會議常常超時。
L.en: You tend to spin your wheels before deciding; the internal meeting often runs over time.

M.zh-CN: 会想，但不至于想死机，属于正常犹豫。
M.zh-TW: 會想，但不至於想死機，屬於正常猶豫。
M.en: You do think, but not to the point of freezing; it is normal hesitation.

H.zh-CN: 拍板速度快，决定一下就不爱回头磨叽。
H.zh-TW: 拍板速度快，決定一下就不愛回頭磨嘰。
H.en: You decide quickly and do not like circling back to fuss over it afterwards.

L.zh-CN: 执行力和死线有深厚感情，越晚越像要觉醒。
L.zh-TW: 執行力和死線有深厚感情，越晚越像要覺醒。
L.en: Execution and deadlines have a deep relationship with you; the later it gets, the more you seem to awaken.

M.zh-CN: 能做，但状态看时机，偶尔稳偶尔摆。
M.zh-TW: 能做，但狀態看時機，偶爾穩偶爾擺。
M.en: You can do it, but your state depends on the moment; sometimes steady, sometimes sloppy.

H.zh-CN: 推进欲比较强，事情不落地心里都像卡了根刺。
H.zh-TW: 推進欲比較強，事情不落地心裡都像卡了根刺。
H.en: You have a strong drive to push things through, and unfinished tasks feel like a thorn in your side.

L.zh-CN: 社交启动慢热，主动出击这事通常得攒半天气。
L.zh-TW: 社交啟動慢熱，主動出擊這事通常得攢半天氣。
L.en: Your social engine warms up slowly, and taking initiative usually requires a lot of buildup.

M.zh-CN: 有人来就接，没人来也不硬凑，社交弹性一般。
M.zh-TW: 有人來就接，沒人來也不硬湊，社交彈性一般。
M.en: If people come to you, you respond; if not, you do not force it. Your social elasticity is average.

H.zh-CN: 更愿意主动打开场子，在人群里不太怕露头。
H.zh-TW: 更願意主動打開場子，在人群裡不太怕露頭。
H.en: You are more willing to open the room yourself and are not too afraid of being seen in a crowd.

L.zh-CN: 关系里更想亲近和融合，熟了就容易把人划进内圈。
L.zh-TW: 關係裡更想親近和融合，熟了就容易把人划進內圈。
L.en: In relationships, you want closeness and fusion, and once you know someone you pull them into the inner circle.

M.zh-CN: 既想亲近又想留缝，边界感看对象调节。
M.zh-TW: 既想親近又想留縫，邊界感看對象調節。
M.en: You want closeness but also some room to breathe; boundaries depend on the person.

H.zh-CN: 边界感偏强，靠太近会先本能性后退半步。
H.zh-TW: 邊界感偏強，靠太近會先本能性後退半步。
H.en: Your boundaries are strong; if someone gets too close, you instinctively step back half a pace.

L.zh-CN: 表达更直接，心里有啥基本不爱绕。
L.zh-TW: 表達更直接，心裡有啥基本不愛繞。
L.en: You speak directly; if something is on your mind, you usually do not like to circle around it.

M.zh-CN: 会看气氛说话，真实和体面通常各留一点。
M.zh-TW: 會看氣氛說話，真實和體面通常各留一點。
M.en: You speak to the vibe of the room; truth and politeness each get a little space.

H.zh-CN: 对不同场景的自我切换更熟练，真实感会分层发放。
H.zh-TW: 對不同場景的自我切換更熟練，真實感會分層發放。
H.en: You are skilled at switching yourself for different situations, and your authenticity arrives in layers.
